targets.expr: sum by (label_node_role) ((1 - avg by (node) (rate(node_cpu_seconds_total{mode="idle"}[5m]))) * on(node) group_left(label_node_role, label_karpenter_sh_nodepool, label_node_kubernetes_io_instance_type, label_topology_kubernetes_io_zone) kube_node_labels * 100)

* 100

1 - (
  sum by (node) (kube_pod_container_resource_requests{resource="cpu"})
  / on(node)
  sum by (node) (kube_node_status_allocatable{resource="cpu"})
) and on(node) kube_node_status_condition{condition="Ready",status="true"} == 1

1 - (
  sum by (node) (kube_pod_container_resource_requests{resource="memory"})
  / on(node)
  sum by (node) (kube_node_status_allocatable{resource="memory"})
) and on(node) kube_node_status_condition{condition="Ready",status="true"} == 1
